# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for microservices architecture
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPC
  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Subnet1
  Subnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Subnet2
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyIGW
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.InternetGatewayId
  RouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: RouteTable1
  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      RouteTableId: !GetAtt RouteTable1.RouteTableId
  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      RouteTableId: !GetAtt RouteTable1.RouteTableId
  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NATGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt ElasticIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyNATGateway
